description_long: This object is a vertical traffic sign mounted on a slender metallic pole. The sign face is octagonal with a red border and a white background, featuring the number '13' in bold black text at its center. The sign's surface appears flat and smooth, with the graphics clearly printed and easily legible from a distance. The pole is metallic gray, cylindrical, and extends well below the sign, suggesting it is designed to be embedded into the ground for stability. The reverse side of the sign is plain and unmarked, with visible mounting hardware attaching the sign to the pole. The overall construction is typical of regulatory or warning signs found in urban environments.
description: A red-bordered octagonal traffic sign with the number '13' in black on a white background, mounted on a tall metallic pole.
description_view_0: The sign is seen at an angle, showing the octagonal shape, red border, and the number '13' clearly.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the thinness of the sign and the pole, with the sign faces stacked in the image.
description_view_2: A direct front view displays the '13' text prominently, with the red border and white background fully visible.
description_view_3: The sign is viewed from the opposite side, showing the plain, unmarked back and the mounting hardware.
